nasb.text: They were double beneath, and together they were complete to its top to the first ring; thus he did with both of them for the two corners.

esv.text: And they were separate beneath but joined at the top, at the first ring. He made two of them this way for the two corners.

cnv.text: 板的下截是雙的，直到上面的第一個環才接合完整；他把兩塊板都這樣做了，形成兩個角。

ccb.text: 木板的下端连于底座，顶端用一个环固定。两个拐角都要这样做。
